Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}If this keeps up, we'll be in good shape.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}If there are any crops that are bruised or misshapen, give 'em to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}They'll still taste fine, and nothin' beats eating 'em freshly picked.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, right. Don't just leave the stems and roots laying around after harvesting the crops.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Take 'em out and replace the soil right away. You can't replant anything until you do that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'm glad you pick up on stuff so quickly. Less trouble that way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You're great to work with, unlike a certain someone.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Cut it out. You sound like Aki.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}I might not be around to help next time, so just do what I say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}You're the one in charge of these. Ya gotta think about whoever's gonna use them after you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I might not be here to help next time, so just do what I say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}You know, I only started this on a whim, but it's worth it every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Even someone like me can, well... How do I put this...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Growing something lets you see the result of your labor, so you feel like you built it with your own hands.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Its life cycle ends once you eat it, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We get hungry just bein' alive, so I guess they play their part.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}But you know, maybe you're right.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}I thought I'd forgotten all about gardening as a kid.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Even if someone disappears, maybe they can still leave somethin' behind...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_2_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Nothin'. Just talkin' to myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_014_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Aragaki seems to have realized[n]something through tending the garden...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_4_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}I ended up sayin' a little too much today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_6_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}Break time's over. Let's get back to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I tended the plants with Aragaki...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Alright, that just about does it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}Thanks for your help. If you ever do this again, I'll join you.[n]{f 1 1}
